disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is requesting a written Fit-to-Fly medical certificate demanded by the airline before a long-haul flight departing in ~10 hours
trigger_question_examples: What do you need from me today?
What exactly is the airline asking for?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I need an official doctor's letter that says my chest infection is gone and I'm safe to fly — the airline won't let me board without a physical medical clearance certificate.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent acute lower respiratory illness (described by patient as viral bronchitis) treated with a completed antibiotic course finished 3 days ago
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the chest infection you mentioned.
What treatment did you have and when did it finish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a chest infection a couple of weeks back — they said it was viral bronchitis. I took a course of amoxicillin and finished it 3 days ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete symptomatic resolution — cough entirely gone for 48 hours, feels back to normal
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling now compared with when you were sick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely better — the cough stopped about two days ago and I've had no symptoms since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies current fever, breathlessness, pleuritic chest pain and haemoptysis (pertinent negatives screening for active pneumonia / pulmonary embolism)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, shortness of breath, sharp chest pain or coughing up blood?
Any calf pain or swelling in your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — no fever, no shortness of breath, no sharp chest pain, nothing coughed up, and my legs feel fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High situational anxiety driven by the administrative barrier and time pressure, not by a physical symptom
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with all this?
What's worrying you most right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm panicking — it's not that I feel sick, it's that I'll lose this flight and a lot of money if I can't get the letter in time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fully independent and asymptomatic — actively packing luggage during the encounter
trigger_question_examples: What are you able to do today?
Are you managing your normal activities?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm totally fine — I'm literally packing my suitcase and moving around with no trouble at all.
